title: Nuker Anti Cheat
description: Nuker Anti Cheat is an anti-cheat plugin designed to block Nuker hack
body:
**Nuker Anti Cheat** 

**Nuker Anti Cheat** is one of the best free plugins against nuker hacks and legit nuker hacks for spigot, paper and purpur servers 1.21 and above.

**Command**:

**- /nukerac reload :** Reload configuration files

**- /nukerac debug :** Show debug to console

**PERMISSIONS:**

**- nukerac.bypass:** bypass NAC check

**- nukerac.notify:** receive in-game notifications for nuker violations

**- nukerac.admin:** use Anti-Nuker administration commands (/nac).

![Kick by using nuker](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b27a14e47ccee7eccd36f45d37abfe8eb18b37dc_0.webp)
